pass1.zone_map_skip: skip block b if zm[b].min_uom > pure_code || zm[b].max_uom < pure_code

pass2.zone_map_skip: same as pass1 — reuse loaded zone maps
pass2.filter: uom_code == pure_code && tagver_code != -1 && sub_fy[adsh_code] == 2022 && value == max_val[((uint64_t)(uint32_t)adsh_code << 32 | (uint32_t)tagver_code)]
pass2.output: thread_local min-heap of 100 rows (value DESC, name_placeholder=adsh_code, tag_placeholder=tagver_code)

join_order.notes: Key = (adsh_code<<32)|tagver_code; exact double equality valid since value stored verbatim
adsh_code == sub row index; O(1) lookup sub_fy[adsh_code] == 2022; apply before max_val probe to reduce hash lookups

filters.mechanism: zone_map skip then per-row check; applied in both passes
direct_array lookup sub_fy[adsh_code]; applied in pass2 before hash probe

data_structures.pure_code_lookup: load from indexes/uom_codes.bin at startup; single int8_t value
data_structures.zone_maps: load indexes/num_zone_maps.bin once; reused for both passes
data_structures.sub_fy_array: mmap or fread sub/fy.bin → int16_t[86135]; direct index by adsh_code
data_structures.pass1_aggregation: compact_hash_map<uint64_t,double> pre_sized=131072 (next power-of-2 above 94564); parallel build with thread-local maps merged via MAX semantics
data_structures.pass2_topk: thread_local std::priority_queue (min-heap, capacity=100) storing (value, adsh_code, tagver_code); merged post-scan to global top-100

pass1_parallelism.granularity: block-level morsels over the ~1 block range passing zone maps
pass1_parallelism.merge: thread_local hash maps merged sequentially: for each key keep max(value)

pass2_parallelism.merge: thread_local min-heaps merged to produce global top-100

parallelism.note: With ~1 contiguous block range (~94564 rows), thread count should be capped to avoid excessive synchronization overhead on small data; runtime auto-tunes morsel size

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks — eliminates ~394/395 blocks per pass; pure rows contiguous due to (uom_code,ddate) sort order
resolve 'pure' string to int8_t code at startup; never hardcode numeric value

aggregation: hash_group_by keyed by (adsh_code<<32 | tagver_code) computing MAX(value) in pass1

name.timing: deferred — decode only for final 100 result rows

tag.timing: deferred — decode only for final 100 result rows
